products.name: ARG-ONE-V5-NVME
products.description: Aluminum Raspberry Pi 5 case with M.2 NVMe SSD slot via PCIe for maximum storage performance.

products.name: Argon EON Pi NAS
products.description: 4-bay Pi NAS enclosure for Raspberry Pi 4 with SATA storage support, full-size HDMI output, and integrated power management. Supports 2.5" SATA SSDs/HDDs and optional 3.5" drives with adapter.

products.name: Argon Industria HMI 5C Enclosure for Official Raspberry Pi 5-Inch Screen
compatible_with: Raspberry Pi 5 / Raspberry Pi 5-inch Touch Display 2
products.description: Industria enclosure designed to house the official Raspberry Pi 5-inch Touch Display 2. Integrates the RPi display into the Industria industrial form factor.

products.name: Argon Industria HMI 7C Enclosure for Official Raspberry Pi 7-Inch Screen
compatible_with: Raspberry Pi 5 / Raspberry Pi 7-inch Touch Display 2
products.description: Industria enclosure designed to house the official Raspberry Pi 7-inch Touch Display 2. Integrates the RPi display into the Industria industrial form factor.

products.name: Argon ONE V5 M.2 Case for Raspberry Pi 5
products.description: Premium aluminium case for Raspberry Pi 5 with integrated M.2 NVMe PCIe storage support via the PCIe FPC connector. Features passive aluminium heatsink body, programmable power button, and repositioned full-size HDMI and USB-C ports. Compatible with Raspberry Pi 5 only.
